Research-grade laboratory instrument

Product Overview

ATOMFAIR® H100-Pro Dry Bath is a controlled dry-bath platform for repeatable sample heating in tubes, plates or block-based laboratory workflows.

The model keeps the original source configuration and separates temperature range, accuracy, uniformity, timer, display, power, size and environmental limits into structured specification rows.

Key Features and Advantages
